global.description: The ad features a vibrant purple background with a clear call to action.
global.main_message: Promoting travel destinations with flexible booking options.

elements.label: Purple gradient background
elements.description: A smooth purple gradient background that fills the entire canvas.

elements.label: Main headline text
elements.description: Bold, white text that reads 'Dream destinations await' positioned at the center of the ad.

elements.label: Flexible booking options
elements.description: Smaller white text below the headline that states 'Flexible booking options'.

elements.label: Price tag
elements.description: A prominent €9.99 price tag displayed in white, centered below the body text.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A bright yellow button with the text 'Order now' that stands out at the bottom of the ad.
elements.text_content: destinations await Flexible booking options €9.99 Order now

elements.label: CloudRoute logo
elements.description: A small logo in the top left corner that reads 'CloudRoute' in a modern font.

elements.label: Sale badge
elements.description: A small circular badge in the top right corner with the word 'SALE' in bold text.

elements.label: User-generated content tag
elements.description: A small tag in the top left corner labeled 'UGC', indicating user-generated content.
